## Meeting Purpose

[Leadership weekly sync to discuss hiring, onboarding, product development, and company strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New hires starting next week: 1 director, 1 managing editor, 1 content manager](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=26.0)
  - [Shifting to batched onboarding every \~3 weeks to improve efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [Developing 2-week intensive onboarding program for content managers](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [Focusing on building tech demos/prototypes to showcase capabilities externally](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)
  - [Planning Series A announcement for late April, coordinating messaging and assets](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)

## Topics

### Hiring Updates

  - [KT accepted offer, former colleague of Sydney from Animals](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=279.0)
  - [Sarah being considered for associate director role, recalibrating offer](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
  - [New design lead (former Grammarly head of design) in final discussions](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=1733.0)
  - [Continuing to source high-quality candidates efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=1185.0)

### Onboarding Process

  - [Developing 2-week intensive program for content managers](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [60 hours/week expectation, mix of learning and deliverables](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [Directors can extend to 4 weeks and customize curriculum](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
  - [Aiming to batch start dates every \~3 weeks to improve efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
  - [Next cohort tentatively starting April 28th](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)

### Linear Implementation

  - [Rolling out Linear for project management across teams](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=1123.0)
  - [Daniel creating Loom video tutorial for basic usage](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
  - [Directors responsible for ensuring teams update Linear before Monday meetings](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)
  - [Using Linear updates to drive account review discussions](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=1143.0)

### Product Development

  - [Focusing on building demo-able prototypes of studio/workflow tools](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Aiming to increase perceived value and generate excitement](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Balancing showcasing capabilities vs. protecting core IP](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=1142.0)
  - [Considering ways to offer limited access or previews to clients/prospects](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=1899.0)

### Company Vision & Strategy

  - [Discussed long-term vision of building comprehensive knowledge work OS](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=3559.0)
  - [Emphasized importance of data collection and learning from service delivery](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=3966.0)
  - [Drawing parallels to Amazon's iterative approach to expanding capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=4080.0)
  - [Balancing near-term service delivery with long-term product development](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=3966.0)

### Series A Announcement

  - [Targeting April 26th or 28th for announcement](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=1037.0)
  - [Developing storylines around services+software model, profitability, AI space](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
  - [Considering additional blog post on product vision/roadmap](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=5149.0)
  - [Coordinating internal/external messaging and social amplification](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)

### Team Structure

  - [Exploring use of international VAs/assistants to increase leadership productivity](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=2192.0)
  - [Aiming for high-potential hires who can grow into larger roles over time](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=2659.0)
  - [Goal of saving 5-10 hours/week per leader through delegation](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=2724.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Finalize offer for Sarah (associate director role)](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
  - [Complete Linear implementation and conduct training](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=1193.0)
  - [Develop Series A announcement assets and coordination plan](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)
  - [Create product demo/prototype for external showcasing](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Finalize 2-week onboarding curriculum for content managers](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=451.0)
  - [Schedule next batched onboarding cohort (tentatively April 28th)](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=687.0)
  - [Explore VA/assistant hiring options for leadership team](https://fathom.video/share/p1ogxHk9VC6gXMdfULVxo2zceTbNPrDU?tab=summary&timestamp=2192.0)
